mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM work_order GROUP BY status
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(good_qty), 0) as totalGoodQty, COALESCE(SUM(defect_qty), 0) as totalDefectQty FROM production_result WHERE result_date = CURDATE()

SELECT w.order_id, p.product_name, w.target_qty, COALESCE(SUM(r.good_qty), 0) AS actual_qty, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r.good_qty ), 0) / w.target_qty * 100, 1) AS progress_rate, w.status FROM work_order w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_result r ON w.order_id = r.order_id GROUP BY w.order_id ORDER BY progress_rate DESC
